task: taxonomy expansion (inserting new concepts into an existing taxonomy)
input: existing taxonomy (DAG) and a set of new concepts to insert
output: predicted parent (anchor) for each new concept
backbone: position-enhanced graph neural network (GNN) encoding local structure of anchor concepts
loss: noise-robust training objective (self-supervised, binary classification loss with label noise handling)
key_idea: self-supervised generation of ⟨query, anchor⟩ pairs from existing taxonomy and a position-enhanced GNN to predict direct hyponym relations
datasets: three large-scale datasets from different domains (not named in abstract)
